text:
Beyond Photography Academy is a HRD Corp (HRDC) certified training provider that specialises in quality education for creative subjects such as photography, videography, photo editing, video editing, social media advertising & many more creative courses. Visit our website at https://beyond.photos for a full range of courses that we provide. Over the years, Beyond Photography has trained more than 300,000 students worldwide, including employees of big brands such as PETRONAS, Bank Negara, RHB Bank, Maxis, FedEx, DHL & many more. Trainer's Profile: 
ANDREW BOEY, B.Sc. (Hons) Major: Chemistry Minor: Business Management (USM, Penang) M.Sc. Information Technology (USM, Penang) is the founder and Director of Academy of Beyond Photography Academy. Andrew's photography training and classes are one of the most sought-after photography syllabuses in the world. His highly effective approach of teaching photography which combines science, mathematics and stand-up comedy has made his classes wildly memorable and easy to understand. Andrew specialises in commercial photography, product photography, portraits photography, & etc. His kaleidoscopic profile extends beyond photography; Andrew is also a popularly sought-after filming director, TV show host, actor and cinematographer. Trainer's Experiences:
Global Malaysia TV Show (Role: Co-Producer & Host)
A 13-episode travel photography TV show that was successfully sold to Astro and RTM2 in 2012. The show is in Bahasa Malaysia and brings the viewers to all the 13 states of Malaysia, from Perlis to Sabah. The show is based on Andrew and his academy students traveling the whole country and capturing the beautiful locations and sharing with viewers. This show ran continuously for two years in TV2 and Astro respectively. Beyond Photography Show (Role: Producer & Host)
Andrew is the main host and producer of a YouTube channel that was produced by Beyond Photography Academy. The channel broadcasts learning content on Photography and Movie-Making techniques and has a total number of close to 220,000 subscribers from all over the world and watch-views of more than 11 million.
title: Ltd, Hitachi eBworx Sdn Bhd, AEON Co (M) Bhd, Fave Asia Sdn Bhd, Jeras…

text:
PHOTO CONTESTS (Role: Judge & Contest Organizer)
Andrew has served as judge in the following photography and videography contests, talents search contests & etc throughout the years.
- IOI Group  - Palm Portraits (by Malaysian Palm Oil Council - MPOC)  - IMKLIK (by Iskandar Investment Bhd)
- K Perak (by Perak Government)  - Indah Water Konsortium - PETRONAS ICT  - Petron - Mah Sing Group Bhd 

Global Malaysia, the TV Series (Role: Main Host)
A 13 episode made for TV2 originally (and syndicated to Astro & TV1) features Andrew as the host teaching photography while bringing the viewers on a nation-wide tour all over Malaysia, from Perlis to Sabah. The series ran for a total of 5 years focusing on Malaysian tourism, coupled with good photography lessons embedded. Dampak, The Movie (Role: Actor)
Dampak is a cinema action movie that stars Aaron Aziz, Farid Kamil, Julia Evans, Cat Farish and many more famous top Malaysia actors. Andrew plays a hardcore psychotic thug named Man, one of the main antagonists of Aaron Aziz’s and Farid Kamil’s character. This movie was broadcasted nationwide in 70 major cinemas and eventually sold and syndicated to Malaysian TV stations and Malaysian Airlines. The movie was produced with a budget of close to RM3 million in 2013. Class Registration Procedures:

Email us for registration at info@beyond.photos 
(In the email, please include participant’s Full Name, Email, Designation, Department & Contact No)

Please apply via HRD Corp grant through e-TRIS portal for HRDC Corp Claimable Course under SBL-KHAS scheme before training date (subject to approval). Please find our MyCoID: 202004003609 at e-TRIS portal. Kindly email us the grant approval 7 days prior to the training.

Class Fees Structure:

INDIVIDUAL:
Class Fee for individual training (face-to-face, not online): RM1,300.00 PER PERSON PER 8-HOUR DAY 
- Class will be conducted at Beyond Photography Academy’s classroom & studio in Kota Damansara
- Post Class Videos & E-Learning contents will be provided at our website: www.beyond.photos
- A Certificate of Completion will be awarded 
- Excluding Food & Beverages, other venue rentals & equipment rental for this workshop. GROUP:
Group Fee for in-house training (face-to-face, not online): RM6,000.00 PER GROUP PER 8-HOUR DAY 
- Up to 8 participants per class (additional participants will be at RM1000 per person)
- Class can be conducted at the choice of: Employer’s Premise, External Training Premise, our Academy or Hotel. 
  (Note: Venue must have sound system, LED TV/Projector & microphone system)
- Post Class Videos & E-Learning contents will be provided at our website: www.beyond.photos
- A Certificate of Completion will be awarded 
- Excluding Food & Beverages, other venue rentals & equipment rental for this workshop. Details for each class:

Class: Basic To Intermediate Photography (B2I)
URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Basic+To+Intermediate+Photography+%28B2I%29
Objective: Learn how to shoot using full Manual Exposure Mode on your DSLR or Mirrorless cameras. In this full-day corporate class, you will learn in detail about Focusing and the various Focusing Modes, Exposure, and Compositional rules that will immediately make your photos look nicer.
title: Upon training completion, please fill up form PSMB/SBL-Khas/JD/14 and…

text:
Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Understand various cameras' models categorization of your favorite camera brands (Group A, B and C) for Mirrorless & DSLRs.
- Know the importance & differences of the camera's output File Size and Quality.
- Learn the correct initial setting for your camera & the various modes of Menu Mode, Shoot Mode & Playback Mode.
- Understand the benefits of learning Manual Exposure in this course.
- Understanding what are Focusing Modes & how they work (AF-S, AF-A & AF-C and also One Shot, AI Focus, AI Servo).
- Understanding what are Focusing Areas (Single, Dynamic, Auto-Area and Single or Auto-Area).
- Understand the difference between Focusing Modes vs Focusing Areas and what Mode and Area best to be used.
- Learn the technique of Focus, Lock & Recompose like how professional photographers do.
- Aperture, and effectively understand its relationship to sharpness, blurriness, depth of field and its contribution to the exposure Mix.
- Shutter, and effectively understanding its relationship to speed, motion and it's contribution to the Exposure Mix.
- ISO, and effectively understand its relationship to sensor sensitivity, image definition and image noise.
- Learn the 5 most important Compositional rules that will make your photos STUNNING immediately.
- Learn to avoid making the same mistakes what most beginners do in terms of camera settings and shooting style. Learning Outcomes:
- Learn to differentiate between Exposure Metering & Focusing and the right sequences of performing them.
- Learn to Focus, Lock & Recompose to achieve faster shooting styles.
- Learn to create distinct Layers in each scene, thus creating photos with depth and contrast.
- Learn the concept of Depth Of Field, participants will be guided on how to create blurry background or sharp background layers.
- Learn to predict when the camera's Exposure Meter will become inaccurate and the limitations of shooting with natural light.
- Learn to trick the camera's Exposure Metering by knowing precisely when to increase exposure or reduce exposure.
- Learn to shoot in dark locations and very dark locations. Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their photography skills. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to take the stage and perform the company’s presentations. Class: Flash Photography
URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Flash+Photography+%28HRDC%29
Objective: Learn how to use your Flash correctly, regardless if the flash is on your cmaera or wirelessly away from your camera. You will NEVER get under-exposured photos anymore after this class.
title: Duration: 8 Hours

text:
Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- The fundamental theory of "Famed 5" to learn how to induce lights into a photo shoot
- Understand each component of the "Famed 5" and how they relate to each other
- Using the TTL mode of your hot-shoe Flash
- How TTL mode works and the advantages of this mode
- The fool-proof settings on your camera and on the flash for TTL mode
- How to get uniform soft light in any location, regardless of location brightness
- How to optimize your Flash to product soft light
- How to use the camera's Aperture to control the Subject Layer's exposure
- How to use the camera's Shutter Speed to control the Background Layer and ambient light exposure
- How to effectively bounce your TTL flash to achieve the desired lighting coverage effects
- How to use your hot-shoe flashes as Remote flash, getting reulsts as good as expensive studio lights
- Understanding when to use TTL on-camera flash and when to use Remote Flash
- Understanding the "888" rule to get correct flash exposure and spot-on reulsts when using Remote Flashes
Learning Outcomes:
- Understand the various modes of a hotshoe flash
- Effectively use TTL mode indoors
- Effectively use TTL mode outdoors
- Correctly predict the value of flash to use so that every photo snapped is always correctly exposed
- Learn how to get studio quality lighting using Remote Flash
- Shoot in a full manual mode flash & also manual mode camera settings
- Use modifiers like Direct Studio Umbrellas, Reverse Studio Umbrellas & Color Gels in the practical sessions
Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their photography skills to take pro-level photos. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to take the stage and perform the company’s presentations. Class: How To Be A Great Video Host
Objective: Train yourself to be able to speak about any topic and present yourself as a great video host. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Intro to Art of Seeing: What makes a photo stand out?
- Learn the 7 basic principles that govern the Art of Seeing.
title: Duration: 8 Hours

text:
How you can take beautiful photos just by following these rules
- Rule of Simplicity with sub rules Space, Rule of Thirds, and Golden Points 
- Rule of Closer: why humans prefer their subjects larger and closer
- Rule of Live & Dead Spaces: How you can tell a story just by compositing your subjects at these areas
- Rule of Geometry: How to apply this set of rules into your daily shots
- Rule of Patterns: An extensive rule covering Repetition, Perspective, Starburst etc & how professionals frequently use these rules to their advantage 
- Rule of Contrast: Learn how contrast is not just about colors, but also about Layers, Movement, & Focus
- Rule of Shadows: Understand and master the rule of Shadows, Silhouette & Reflections
- Learn how to combine multiple rules and capture a true masterpiece
Learning Outcomes:
- Understand the key elements that contribute to a compelling photograph.
- Explore the foundational principles governing the Art of Seeing.
- Break down the Rule of Simplicity and its sub-rules to create visually appealing compositions.
- Explore why bringing subjects closer enhances visual impact and engagement.
- Understand how composition in live and dead spaces can convey a story.
- Learn how to incorporate geometric principles into your daily shots for enhanced visual appeal.
- Explore the extensive rule of patterns and how professionals leverage them for impactful photography.
- Expand the concept of contrast to include various elements like layers, movement, and focus.
- Delve into the use of shadows, silhouettes, and reflections to add depth and interest to photographs.
- Learn how to synergize and apply multiple rules simultaneously to create exceptional and visually striking photographs. Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their presentation skills. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to take the stage and perform the company’s presentations. Class: Body Language In Selling
Objective: Learn to enhance communication skills and improve sales effectiveness by understanding and interpreting non-verbal cues exhibited by both the salespersons and the potential customers. By learning to recognize subtle signals such as gestures, facial expressions, and posture, sales professionals can adjust their approach and ultimately increase their chances of making successful sales. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Human Anatomy: how the audience & customers psychologically perceive your body & non-verbal projections.
- Correlating Human Emotions to Forward Motion & Outward Gestures.
- Understand Upward Motion & Close Gestures.
- Learn to determine & empower your Comfortable Side.
- Learn to determine & empower your Beautiful Side.
- Learn what your Head Motions & Eyes Movements mean.
- Putting all your Sides, Gestures & Motions to your advantage. Tricks Make Yourself Likable & Lovable!
- Learn the 4 types of Smiles & how to improve on your Smiling.
- Differences between Truths vs Lies.
- Fine-tuning & implementing your Body Language at work & in public.
title: How you can take beautiful photos just by following these rules

text:
Body language & gestures to avoid.
- Learn how to read your customer’s body language & learn Body Language fine-tuning.
- Explore the different ways to respond/counter your customers’ objections based on common body language signs.
- Learn how to use open and engaged body language to show interest and enthusiasm.
- How to use body language to control the pace of the sales meeting or negotiation.
- Techniques for using nonverbal cues to close the sale or move the pitch forward.
- How to use body language to manage your own emotions during high-pressure Sales situations.
- Tips for maintaining a consistent and authentic body language style over time. Learning Outcomes:
- The importance of body language in selling.
- To be aware of their own body language and how it may impact the sales conversation.
- Determine the usual mistakes that they have been making that cost them to lose Sales.
- Strategies to manage their own body language during interactions with the audience & customers
- Common customer body language signs and what they mean
- How to use body language to show interest & sway decisions to your advantage
- How to use positive body language to diffuse tension or objections
- Strategies for ongoing learning and improvement in body language awareness and application
Who Should Attend: This course is beneficial for a variety of individuals, particularly those involved in roles where sales, negotiation and interpersonal communications. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be capable Sales Professionals, Customer Service Representatives, Marketing Professionals, and Public Speakers. Class: Build A Custom AI Chatbot For WhatsApp
URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Building+AI+Chatbots+For+Whatsapp
Objective: This course is designed to equip participants with the knowledge and hands-on skills required to build and deploy a custom AI chatbot for WhatsApp. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Setting up a Contact Number & WhatsApp Account for AI Bot Chats: Learn how to register a dedicated WhatsApp number for chatbot interactions.  
- Learn how the API works
- Learn how to choose the different AI models for your chatbots: OpenAI, DeepSeek, Character AI, and others
- Understand how codes are made (learning coding is optional in this class; all codes will be provided)
- Learn to install all dependencies required to deploy your bot in 20 minutes.
- Learn what each dependency does and its role.
- Learn to tune, prompt, and tweak your bot to chat naturally like a human.
- Learn the choices of telco and their packages for SIM cards (from physical SIMs to non-physical SIMs)
- Setting up a WhatsApp Group for AI Bot Chats: Configure bot permissions and manage multiple users within a group chat.  
- Bot runs on a normal WhatsApp account and needs no Business Account on WhatsApp. IMPORTANT: Participants who have no programming language will be taught the basics, while advanced coders will enjoy how easy yet flexible this class is.  (Codes involved, around one A4 page of codes only.
title: Body language & gestures to avoid.

text:
We will learn to use Node.js for this project.)
- Choosing a Running Environment for Your AI Bot (Self-Hosted or Cloud-Hosted): Compare the advantages and limitations of self-hosting vs. cloud-hosting solutions and get an overview of popular platforms for deploying AI chatbots.  
- Setting up the Bot’s Character & Personality: Define the bot’s tone, response style, and engagement level to match your brand identity.  
- Setting up the Bot’s Knowledge Bank: Understand how AI-powered bots retrieve and process data to generate replies.  
- Setting up the Bot’s Memory of Chats with Other Users: Implement short-term and long-term memory features to improve user interactions.  
- Fine-tuning the Bot’s Character and Chatting Styles: Adjust response timing, wording, and conversational flow for better engagement.  
- Deploying Your AI Chatbot LIVE on WhatsApp: Step-by-step guide to launching the chatbot. You will learn on-premise deployment on your own home or office computers (Mac OSX or Windows) or use cloud-hosted servers.
- Learn Various Tips & Tricks to Test Your Bots: Troubleshoot common issues and enhance bot efficiency. Learning Outcomes:
- Set up a fully functional AI chatbot for WhatsApp.  
- Choose the right hosting solution for their chatbot.  
- Define and refine the bot’s personality to align with its brand.  
- Train the bot to handle FAQs and provide accurate responses.  
- Implement chatbot memory for improved user engagement.  
- Deploy and test the chatbot effectively before going live.  
- Optimize and fine-tune the bot’s performance based on user feedback. Who Should Attend: Business Owners & Entrepreneurs looking to automate customer interactions, Customer Service Managers seeking AI-driven solutions to handle FAQs, IT & Technical Teams responsible for implementing AI chat solutions, or Digital Transformation Specialists looking to integrate AI into business workflows. Class: Capture Stunning Photos With Any Camera
Objective: Passionate about capturing great photos and expressing your creativity through photography? Look no further! In this intensive course, we will equip you with the skills & knowledge to create great photos using ANY CAMERA, be it a DSLR, Mirrorless, Point-&-Shoot camera or even Smartphones!
title: We will learn to use Node.js for this project.)

text:
Duration: 4 Hours
Class Outline:
- Learn the three crucial aspects of photography: Exposure, Focusing, and Composition
- Master exposure techniques, including setting ISO the right way and tweaking for brightness & darkness
- Understand and master Exposure Simulation, Metering & Histogram to get perfect brightness
- Understand how a Smartphone sensor differs from a DSLR & Mirrorless and how to get spot-on exposure all the time.
- Understand what a camera's Focusing Modes & Areas are and how to use them effectively 
- learn how to lock focus on your subject & at the same time attain perfect exposure with AEL/AFL on smartphone
- Explore composition principles, such as the Rule of Thirds and effective use of space
- Understand how Compositions are divided into 5 important groups of rules; in the concept of Arts Of Seeing.
- Learn how humankind have been perceiving images based on these criterias:- Colors: how colors have been an important cognitive part of human perception
- Space: learn how giving room and space to a photo will immediately make a photo many folds nicer
- Closer: learn how humans are captivated by Closeness and details in image evaluation
- Simplicity: learn how artists & creative professionals use Simplicity to draw the attention of their viewers. Learning Outcomes:
- Gain the ability to create stunning photos with any camera device.
- Understand how to manipulate exposure settings for desired results.
- Understand the advantages & limitations of a Smartphone camera
- Navigate and manipulate the camera settings of a Smartphone to produce better images
- Capture clear and sharp images of both still and moving subjects.
- Create visually pleasing compositions using the Rule of Thirds and effective use of space.
- Elevate the overall aesthetic appeal of your photographs with ten essential rules of composition. Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their photography skills regardless of the device used to capture the photos. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to capture photo moments during company events, interviews, or even produce social media worthy photos. Class: Editing Videos Using Capcut
Objective: Learn the basics of video editing from start to finish using Capcut - The most powerful free video editing software on the market. This course focuses on different types of video editing, and basic video editing principles. And highly useful editing tips & tricks. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Learn Capcut file management, how to create the correct working folders & how to organize all media prior to starting your video edits
- Identifying the “Good Takes”, suitable footage for use in your project
- Navigating the interface. Learn the various tools in Capcut and how to use them
- What is a “Project Timeline”, how Capcut handles the timeline & how to arrange your selected clips in the timeline
- Managing your edits. Learn about the Rough Cut (a.k.a.
title: Duration: 4 Hours

text:
Offline edits) and the transition to Online Editing
- Learn all about Audio in video-editing
- Master audio syncing (how to merge videos from cameras with audio from different sources (from audio recorders)
- Adding various graphical elements into your timeline to draw attention to specific parts of the frame 
- Learn about frame transitions, what they mean, and when to use them in your videos
- Learn how to choose suitable background music & incorporate it into your video
- Learn where to obtain royalty-free music and songs online
- Learn about the standard output video formats and how to export your final video outputs
Learning Outcomes:
- Utilize Capcut to create their own videos 
- Sort and identify suitable footage for use in their edits
- Navigate and be familiar with Capcut’s interface
- Sync the audio to the corresponding video footage
- Arrange a rough timeline
- Add B-rolls, cutaways, and assets to the timeline
- Use different types of transitions between frames
- Add background music and foleys to enhance the video
- Export the final video to a suitable format
Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their video editing skills. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to perform the company’s video editing works for events, interviews, educational videos & various types of videos. Class: The Art Of Selling
Objective: Equip yourselves with the knowledge, skills, and strategies necessary to excel in sales roles and drive business. Participants will be taught the fundamental principles of sales, how to develop effective communication skills to build rapport and address customer needs. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Introduction to Sales, the process of persuading a potential customer to purchase a product or service.
- Learn about the evolution of sales techniques, and the modern digital marketing world
- Understand how the sales funnel works: The stages a customer goes through from product awareness to purchase.
- Learn strategies to identify potential customers and qualifying leads.
- Learn effective communication skills to understand your customer’s needs and concerns.
- Understand how critical it is to fully understand the product/service you are offering, how this can help address any customer concern or even tailor your services to suit your customer.
- Learn how emotions influence purchasing decisions and strategies to drive sales by utilizing the emotional aspect.
- Learn how to develop sales plans and strategies.
- Learn about the importance of ethical behavior in sales, and how ethical conduct contributes to long-term success and customer trust. Learning Outcomes:
-The importance of sales in business
- How the sales funnel works, from the customer awareness stage till closing the sale.
- How to adapt sales pitches to suit these different groups and demographics
- Effective communication skills to identify what the customer wants
- Strategies for addressing customer skepticism, hesitation and reluctance 
- How to tap into customer’s emotional trigger to help influence purchasing decisions
- The importance of ethical behavior in sales
Who Should Attend: This course is beneficial for a variety of individuals, particularly those involved in roles where sales, negotiation and interpersonal communication are key. Suitable for companies who want to train their sales staff to be more capable Sales Professionals, Customer Service Representatives, or Marketing Professionals. Class: Transformative Public Speaking Techniques
Objective: Learn the essential skills & techniques needed for effective public speaking. By learning to articulate their messages & thoughts clearly and effectively, participants will be more able to influence and persuade different audiences.

text:
Participants will also learn to overcome their stage fright, which will in turn boost speaking confidence. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Introduction to Public Speaking, the 5 Important Modes every new speaker must understand & master.
- Learn the tricks of self-prepping before every speech; from Breathing, Smiling to Comfortable Sides 
- Master the trick of overcoming stage stress
- Learn about the standard structure (Intro, body, conclusion) and learn the trick to use Hooks to captivate audience
- Understand how to quickly adapt your content based on your target audience to ensure relevance & engagement
- How to use visual aids effectively, e.g using powerpoint, charts and videos to complement your speech without overwhelming the audience.
- How to balance your content to keep your audience engaged
- Learn various methods to control voice modulation, pitch, and pacing.
- Learn about the effective use of gestures, facial expressions and movement around the stage.
- Learn how to build your confidence and keep stage fright at bay
Learning Outcomes:
-The fundamentals of public speaking
- Techniques for assessing audience demographics and interest
- How to adapt messages to suit these different groups and demographics
- How to structure speeches for maximum impact
- How to integrate other media such as powerpoint and videos effectively
- To master vocal variety, tone, and pacing
- Strategies to combat fear and stage fright
- To develop a routine for easy practice and continuous learning
Who Should Attend: This course is beneficial for a variety of individuals, particularly those involved in roles where sales, negotiation and interpersonal communication are key. text:
How you can take beautiful photos using these rules
- Rule of Simplicity with sub-rules Space, Rule of Thirds, & Golden Poins 
- Rule of Closer: why humans prefer their subjects larger & closer
- Rule of Live & Dead Spaces: How you can tell a story just by compositing subjects on these areas
- Rule of Geometry: How to apply this set of rules into your daily shots
- Rule of Patterns: An extensive rule covering Repetition, Perspective, Starburst etc & how professionals frequently use these rules to their advantage 
- Rule of Contrast: Learn how contrast is not just about brightness & colors; but also Layers, Movement, & Focus
- Rule of Shadows: Understand and master the rule of Shadows, Silhouette & Reflections
- Learn how to combine multiple rules & capture true good photos
- Learn what rules to avoid putting together; preventing over-doing, over-cluttering and overwhelming your viewers 
- Learn how the professionals do it by evaluating and studying award winning photos during this class
Learning Outcomes:

- Explore the foundational principles governing the Art of Seeing.
- Break down the Rule of Simplicity and its sub-rules to create visually appealing compositions.
- Explore why bringing subjects closer enhances visual impact and engagement.
- Understand how composition in live and dead spaces can convey a story.
- Learn how to incorporate geometric principles into your daily shots for enhanced visual appeal.

- Export the final photo to a suitable format

- Learn how to effectively modify your lights

- Learn how to setup your equipment for a video shoot using your Smartphone
- Smartphone video settings & how to make a scene look like it is shot on a professional video camera
- Additional camera settings to help aid your shoots.

URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Portrait+Photography+%28HRDC%29
Objective: Take your portrait photography to the next level by understanding the fundamentals of portrait photography. This class will help participants to build their confidence in using their equipment while understanding the process of creating a portrait. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:

- The Comfortable Side - Learn the fundamentals to pose any subject
- Posing the arms, hands fingers, shoulders and heads
- Posing Men & Women
- Making your subjects Younger, Slimmer & Taller in photos
- Portrait Crops - Learn the correct portrait croppings and when to use them
- The Actual Front - Learn how to make your subject look more friendly & engaging
- Coded Smiles - Getting the suitable smiles for your subjects

title: Learning Outcomes:

text:
Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Camera gear & the recommended camera settings for product photography
- Lighting & accessories needed
- Where to focus when there is a single product, multiple products in 1 shot, or when there is a model on set

- Shooting Transparent Products

Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to capture marketable product photos: Brand Managers, Marketing Managers, Designers etc. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to shoot the company’s products professionally & go to market with greater speed. Class: Video & Filming (Video Production)

text:
Learn how to set up various types of lights, from natural lighting to induced light (eg: LEDs)

Class: Video Color Correction & Color Grading
URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Video+Color+Correction+%26+Color+Grading
Objective: Learn the basics of color correction and color grading in video editing, from start to finish. This course focuses on how to utilize DaVinci Resolve to create awesome color grades in videos within the software along with highly useful tips & tricks. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Introduction to Color Correction: What is Color Correction and what is the difference between Color Correction and Color Grading. 
- Interface: Introduction to the tools and interface of DaVinci Resolve, where to locate the various tools and what are their functions.
- Color Wheel: How color wheels allow color relationships to be represented geometrically, and show the relationship between primary colors, secondary colors and tertiary colors.
- Waveforms: Using waveforms to monitor luma or brightness of a scene in videos.
- Vectorscope: Using vectorscope to help analyze hue and chroma levels and eliminate unwanted color casts. 
- Shadows, Midtone, Highlights: How to use these 3 tones creatively to improve your Color Grade.
- Matching colors using Waveforms & Vectorscope
- Introduction to the Nodes-based workflow
- Creating masks to isolate areas of the clip to be excluded from the grade
- Exporting your work
Learning Outcomes:
- Navigate the complexities of DaVinci Resolve and identify the various tools. 
- Use the Color Wheel to analyze the scene colors and plan the Color Grade
- Use the Waveform to analyze and correct luma or brightness values
- Analyze the Vectorscope and use the information to eliminate color casts
- Incorporate the 3 main tones of Shadow, Midtones & Highlights into your scenes
- Match colors between scenes using Waveforms & Vectorscope
- Use & manage Nodes
- Create masks to separate the color layers
- Export the final video to a suitable & your desired format
Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their color grading skills.
title: Learn how to set up various types of lights, from natural lighting to…

text:
Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to do color grades for the company’s various types of videos. Class: Video Editing (Level 1)
URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Video+Editing%3A+Level+1
Objective: Learn the basics of video editing from start to finish. This course focuses on different types of video editing, and basic video editing principles. And highly useful editing tips & tricks. Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Learn about file management, how to create the correct working folders & how to organize all media prior to starting your video edits
- Identifying the “Good takes”, suitable footage for use in your project
- Navigating the interface. Learn the various tools in your video editor and how to use them
- What is a “Project Timeline”, how do different programs handle the timeline & how to arrange your selected clips in the timeline
- Managing your edits! Learn about the Rough Cut (a.k.a. Offline edits) and the transition to Online Editing
- Learn about Audio syncing - How to merge a video (from a camera) with audio that was recorded simultaneously from a different source (from an audio recorder)
- Adding various graphical assets into your timeline to draw attention to specific parts of the frame 
- Learn about frame transitions and when to use them to your advantage
- Learn how to choose suitable background music & incorporate it into your video
- Learn about the standard output video formats and how to export your final video
Participants can choose any of these video editing software (please inform us of your choice before class starts):
- Adobe Premiere Pro  - Apple Final Cut Pro  - Filmora  - DaVinci Resolve  - Or ANY other editing software you wish to use
Learning Outcomes:
- Utilize video editing software to create their own videos 
- Sort and identify suitable footage for use in their edits
- Navigate the interface of your selected video editing software
- Sync the audio to the corresponding video footage
- Arrange a rough timeline
- Add B-rolls, cutaways, and assets to the timeline
- Use different types of transitions between frames
- Add background music and foleys to enhance the video
- Export the final video to a suitable format
Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their videography skills. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to perform the company’s videography works for events, interviews, educational videos & various types of videos. Class: Create Video Animation With Adobe Animate
URL: https://beyond.photos/product_main.asp?ProductName=Create+Video+Animation+With+Adobe+Animate
Objective: Learn the basics of how to animate graphics and animation videos using Adobe Animate from start to finish. This course focuses on how to utilize Adobe Animate to create awesome 2D animations along with highly useful tips & tricks.
title: Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able…

text:
Duration: 8 Hours
Class Outline:
- Introduction to Adobe Animate: The evolution from Adobe Flash and how to utilize this software to create 2D animations. 
- Interface: Introduction to the tools and interface of Adobe Animate, where to locate the various tools and what are their functions.
- Animation: The 2 methods to you can use to animate your character (Tweening OR Frame-by-frame)
- Raster & Vector based animations, which animation method to use on Raster images & Vector images
- Creating shapes: Creating various shapes from the available tools.
- The Magic Pencil and Pen tools: How & when to use them.
- Layers: How layers work and how the layers interact with each other.
- Master Layer properties & additional features/options
- The Width tool: Using this tool to manipulate lines.
- Keyframes: Basic concept of keyframes and how to start animating using this method
- Animating shapes using the Tweening method
- The Text tool: Using the text tool and how to add animations to text.
- Making more complicated animations
- Exporting your animations. Learning Outcomes:
- Navigate the layout & menus of Adobe Animate and identify the various tools. 
- Identify raster & vector images and classify them as such
- Create various shapes using the tools available within Adobe Animate
- Use the Magic Pencil & Pen tools to extract desired shapes and characters
- Incorporate and manipulate Layers to improve the animations (including Layers options & features)
- Manage keyframes to adjust animation duration
- Animate shapes using the Tweening method
- Add text and animate the text layer
- Export the final video to a suitable format
Who Should Attend: Anyone who wants to improve their animation skills. Suitable for companies who want to upskill their employees to be able to do 2D animations for the company’s various types of videos.
title: Duration: 8 Hours
